themes.name: AI Compute & Power Infrastructure
themes.description: AI compute buildout links datacenters, accelerators, grid access, power equipment, and capex cycles.

themes.name: US Fiscal and Duration Pressure
themes.description: Fiscal supply, term premium, and long-end rates are shaping cross-asset positioning.

variables.name: AI Adoption
variables.description: AI penetration across software, content, devices, and vertical industry workflows.
variables.currentState: A same-day follow-up note reinforces that power bottlenecks and grid upgrades are central to the AI capex chain.
variables.pricingPath: Power availability is becoming a bottleneck for compute deployment.
variables.riskStatement: This variable weakens if reports stop reinforcing ai adoption as a live market driver.

reports.title: Utilities and rates now sit inside the same AI trade
reports.author: Hermes Demo
reports.summary: The market is increasingly treating power infrastructure, yields, and capex as linked components of the AI trade.
keyClaims: AI capex needs physical infrastructure beyond semiconductors.
Higher yields can change where in the chain capital wants exposure.

reports.title: Term premium repricing is re-entering the equity conversation
reports.author: Hermes Demo
reports.summary: Fiscal supply and higher-for-longer assumptions are pushing duration and yields back into focus.
keyClaims: Long-duration equities remain exposed to higher real rates.
Macro narratives are re-linking fiscal pressure with style dispersion.

reports.title: AI datacenter buildout is pulling forward grid investment
reports.author: Hermes Demo
reports.summary: A same-day follow-up note reinforces that power bottlenecks and grid upgrades are central to the AI capex chain.
keyClaims: Power availability is becoming a bottleneck for compute deployment.
Utilities and electrical equipment sit earlier in the capex chain than semis.
Transmission and utility capex are moving closer to the center of the AI narrative.
Electrical equipment vendors gain from faster interconnection investment.

logicChains.title: Fiscal supply pressure re-prices long-duration assets
logicChains.trigger: The market is increasingly treating power infrastructure, yields, and capex as linked components of the AI trade.
logicChains.firstOrderEffect: AI capex needs physical infrastructure beyond semiconductors.
logicChains.secondOrderEffect: Cross-asset leadership shifts toward shorter-duration and inflation-aware exposures.
logicChains.falsification: The US Fiscal and Duration Pressure thesis weakens if new reports stop reinforcing this chain.

divergencePoints.title: Debate around ai-compute-power-infra
divergencePoints.bullCase: AI capex needs physical infrastructure beyond semiconductors.
divergencePoints.bearCase: Positioning can unwind if incoming reports stop extending the ai-compute-power-infra narrative.
divergencePoints.whatBreaksTie: The next wave of reports, macro data, and company guidance will determine whether this theme broadens or fades.

divergencePoints.bearCase: Positioning can unwind if incoming reports stop extending the us-fiscal-duration narrative.

decisionMemo.headline: Capital attention is clustering around the most reinforced themes across the latest report set.
decisionMemo.summary: The current artifact emphasizes the themes with the strongest report reinforcement, evidence quality, and cross-report recurrence.
watchItems: AI capex needs physical infrastructure beyond semiconductors.
Long-duration equities remain exposed to higher real rates.
Power availability is becoming a bottleneck for compute deployment.
candidateExpressions: Track listed beneficiaries linked to ai-compute-power-infra for confirmation or fade.
Track listed beneficiaries linked to us-fiscal-duration for confirmation or fade.
invalidations: New reports stop reinforcing the current top themes.
The most cited macro variables reverse without follow-through in fresh research.

heroQuestions: What is capital paying attention to right now?
Which narratives are strengthening across reports?
Where do consensus and divergence matter for positioning?
headlineOverride: Capital attention is clustering around AI infrastructure and fiscal-duration pressure.
